Page 6 — Employer
Candidate Pipeline
app/hr/jobs/[id]/page.tsx
Split-pane: candidate list + detail panel. Scorecard (shared component), gap report, interview Qs, stage/decision controls, full escrow management.
EMPLOYER ONLY
Unchanged structure from v1
2
Section breakdown
Content
Candidate rows: avatar, name, fit score badge, stage badge, decision badge
Sorted by fit score descending
Selected row highlighted
Interaction
Click row → sets selectedAppId → loads right panel
Mobile: full-screen list → tap → full-screen detail (back button)
Data deps
GET /applications/hr/jobs/:jobId
5 sections
S2: ScorecardView (isPublic) — shared component
S3: Gap report (matched/missing/fit%)
S4: Interview Qs (lazy accordion)
S5: Stage + Decision controls
S6: Escrow management (post-approval)
Key interactions
Stage select: dropdown → updateStage → optimistic rail update
Approve/Reject: buttons → updateDecision → reveals escrow section
Interview Qs: fetched lazily on accordion open
Escrow: 4 sub-states with polling
Data deps
GET /applications/hr/:appIdGET /applications/hr/:appId/scorecardGET /applications/hr/:appId/interview-questionsPATCH /applications/hr/:appId/decisionPATCH /applications/hr/:appId/stageGET /escrow/status/:jobPostIdPOST /escrow/set-candidatePOST /escrow/confirm-fundedPOST /escrow/confirm-released
